steps: Read sentence-level voiceover units with stable voice_id values.
Generate final Chinese voiceover audio using ElevenLabs with timestamps.
Use the returned timestamp alignment as the source of truth.
Write subtitle_timeline.generated.vertical.json with bilingual cues keyed by voice_id and visual_section_id.
Update video-app/src/data/LiteraryEmbersValidationAudio.ts to read the aligned cues and final voiceover audio path.
Render only after audio-aligned subtitle timing is wired into the composition.

conditions: audio was generated but timestamp alignment is unavailable

hard_rules: Do not render final voiceover versions from hand-guessed subtitle frames.
Every final subtitle cue must map to a voice_id and a visual_section_id.
Bilingual subtitle text can be authored manually, but timing must come from generated audio.
